blended.narrative: Poley Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
